info.title: KoreShield API
info.description:
Enterprise LLM Security Platform
            
            ## Getting Started
            1. Sign up: Create an account at /v1/management/signup
            2. Login: Get your JWT token from /v1/management/login
            3. Authorize: Click the Authorize button above and paste your token
            4. Use the API: Send prompts through /v1/chat/completions with automatic security scanning
            
            ## Core Features
            - Real-time Threat Detection: Automatic scanning of all LLM interactions
            - Multi-Provider Support: OpenAI, Anthropic, DeepSeek, Gemini, Azure OpenAI
            - Analytics and Monitoring: Track costs, usage, and security events
            - Policy Management: Configure security rules and access controls
            - Team Collaboration: Multi-tenant support with RBAC

post.description: Create a new user account with email verification. Sends welcome and verification emails.

example.message: Signup successful! Please check your email to verify your account.

400.description: Email already registered or invalid password

post.description: Authenticate user with email and password. Returns JWT token for subsequent requests.
Admin logout endpoint (stateless - just returns success).

get.description: List all API keys for the authenticated user

schema.title: Response List Api Keys V1 Management Api Keys Get

post.description: Generate a new API key for authentication. The full key is only shown once!

get.description: Get details of a specific API key
Get cost analytics data for the specified time range.

schema.title: Response Get Cost Analytics V1 Analytics Costs Get

get.description: Get a summary of current period costs.
Get all users with optional search and filter.

schema.title: Response Get Users V1 Rbac Users Get

get.description: Get a specific user by ID.
